acorns.name: unique_project_names
acorns.description: Unique project names across all assets

acorns.name: asset_basics
acorns.description: Commonly used asset metadata, one row per data asset

columns.name: _id
columns.description: DocDB record ID for the asset

columns.name: _last_modified
columns.description: DocDB last modified timestamp for the asset record

columns.name: modalities
columns.description: Modalities present in the asset, comma-separated if multiple

columns.name: project_name
columns.description: Project name associated with the asset

columns.name: data_level
columns.description: Data level of the asset (e.g. raw, derived)

columns.name: acquisition_start_time
columns.description: Acquisition start time in ISO format

columns.name: acquisition_end_time
columns.description: Acquisition end time in ISO format

columns.name: code_ocean
columns.description: Code Ocean asset ID if available

columns.name: process_date
columns.description: Date of latest processing in YYYY-MM-DD format

columns.name: genotype
columns.description: Genotype information for the subject if available

columns.name: location
columns.description: Location of the asset in S3

acorns.name: source_data
acorns.description: Mapping from derived asset names to their source raw asset names

columns.name: source_data
columns.description: Asset name that this derived asset was generated from, if available

acorns.name: raw_to_derived
acorns.description: Mapping from raw asset names to their derived asset names

acorns.name: quality_control
acorns.description: Quality control table with one row per QC metric, partitioned by subject_id

columns.name: value
columns.description: Metric value, converted to string if not already a string

columns.name: asset_name
columns.description: Asset name the metric is associated with

acorns.name: assets_smartspim
acorns.description: SmartSPIM assets including processing status and neuroglancer links

columns.name: processing_end_time
columns.description: Processing end time for stitched asset

columns.name: processed
columns.description: Whether a stitched derived asset exists

columns.name: name
columns.description: Asset name (stitched if available, otherwise raw)
